creator: chane.fullmer@nokia.com
text:
In the process of installing FBSD 4.0 I get an error from the SCSI controller as follows:
   "ahc0: Someone reset channel A"

This repeats until the machine is rebooted.
The controller is an Adaptec AH2940UW bios 1.34.3
(Note: I have also tried a BIOS 1.25, with same results)

Also, the machine is a dual CPU with an ASUS motherboard

--chane

How-To-Repeat: Turn the machine on..:)
